nasb.text: The fear of the Lord is a fountain of life, That one may avoid the snares of death.

esv.text: The fear of the Lord is a fountain of life, that one may turn away from the snares of death.

cnv.text: 敬畏耶和華是生命的泉源， 能使人避開死亡的網羅。

ccb.text: 敬畏耶和华是生命的泉源， 可以使人避开死亡的陷阱。

csbs.text: 敬畏耶和华是生命的泉源， 可以使人远离死亡的陷阱。
